metadata.description: Indie toolkit with iOS development, macOS tooling, and more

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Cross-stack development workflow: brainstorm, planning, phase orchestration, execution, review, debugging, design analysis, commits, and session management

plugins.name: apple-dev
plugins.description: Complete iOS/macOS/iPadOS development workflow plugin for Claude Code

plugins.name: mactools
plugins.description: macOS automation toolkit plugin with Notes, Calendar, Mail, Safari, Spotlight, and more

plugins.name: product-lens
plugins.description: Product evaluation plugin for indie developers: demand validation, market analysis, moat assessment, feature assessment, and portfolio comparison

plugins.name: skill-audit
plugins.description: Review Claude Code plugins, skills, agents, hooks, and commands from the AI executor perspective

plugins.name: domain-intel
plugins.description: Domain intelligence engine: automated collection, AI analysis, and trend synthesis from GitHub, RSS, official changelogs, notable figures, and companies. Includes targeted deep research with evolving focus profiles. LENS-personalized with evolving profiles.

plugins.name: session-intel
plugins.description: AI session analytics: extract, analyze, and correlate Claude Code and Codex sessions with git history. Retro, search, replay, trends, cost, and health scoring.

plugins.name: yt-intel
plugins.description: YouTube video curation tool - scrapes recommended/search videos, extracts transcripts, scores with Claude AI on 6 dimensions, outputs TOP-5 recommendations + FYI summaries
